chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No. D- 3562 of 2019 Date Order with signature of Judge (Priority). 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 16006/19. 2. For hearing of main case. ----------------- 13.03.2023. Mr. Asad Khan, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Khalid Rajpar, Advocate for respondent. Mr. Muhammad Idrees holding brief for Mr. Muhammad Bilal Bhatti, Advocate for Respondent. ----------- Learned Counsel for the Petitioner, under instruction, does not press instant Petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed with pending application(s). Judge Judge Ayaz
